title: Delete a Connection
content:
# Delete a Connection You can delete a Connection in two ways. This action is permanent and can not be undone. You will need to deploy a new workload with all the right settings.
=== "From Connection List" Go to **Connections** in the Kelvin UI. Then click on the **Delete** icon on the relevant Connection row to change it running status. Follow the instructions to confirm your delete action. === "From Connection Details" Go to **Connections** in the Kelvin UI and click on the Connection to view its details. Then click on the hamburger menu at the top of the page and select **Delete Connection** to delete it. Follow the instructions to confirm your delete action.
summary: You can delete a Connection in two ways.
